title: ceratosanthes parviflora
intro: Ceratosanthes parviflora is a plant species belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered Ceratosanthes. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ceratosanthes parviflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in traditional medicine, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements in the form of capsules or tinctures.
